description: A bearded young man in dark formal attire reclines in a chair draped with a tiger skin, his head resting on his left hand in a pose of languid contemplation. Behind him, a table holds a blue-and-white porcelain vase, books, and other objects suggesting a cultured interior. Soft light enters from a window at the upper left, illuminating his face and the striking pattern of the tiger pelt. The painting conveys wealth, intellectual refinement, and a touch of exotic display characteristic of Victorian portraiture.
